---
title: "04. 唯一稀疏分解与规范形"
subtitle: "Unique Sparse Decomposition and Canonical Form"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 4
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `zeckendorf_uniqueness` across 道德经、易经、黄帝内经、孙子兵法、几何原本 and the Gen 2 papers."
---

## 定理锚点 / Lean Anchors

| 角色 | 定理 |
|---|---|
| 主定理核 | `zeckendorf_uniqueness` |
| 支撑定理 1 | `zeckendorf_injective` |

## 文本导航 / Classical Works

- [道德经](../tao-te-ching/index.qmd)
- [易经](../i-ching/index.qmd)
- [孙子兵法](../sunzi/index.qmd)
- [黄帝内经](../huangdi-neijing/index.qmd)
- [几何原本](../elements/index.qmd)

## 论文导航 / Gen 2 Papers

- [Canonical Zeckendorf Normalization and the Minimal Berstel Adder](../../science/gen2/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo.qmd)
- [Finite-Window Rigidity in Fibonacci Numeration](../../science/gen2/resolution-folding-core-symbolic-dynamics.qmd)

## NotebookLM Slides

[Download zh-primary bilingual slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/synthesis_04_zeckendorf_uniqueness_slides.pdf)

## 正文 / Essay

{{< include articles/synthesis_04_zeckendorf_uniqueness.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
